content.text:
<user_query>
Very thoroughly list every .ts and .tsx file under /Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/src/ whose filename (not directory, just the basename) is NOT kebab-case. Kebab-case means all lowercase with hyphens separating words (e.g. `app-header.tsx`, `campaign-api-scope.ts`). Files that are a single word (e.g. `error.ts`, `router.tsx`) are fine.

Exclude:
- Files under node_modules
- Route files (files under src/routes/) - these follow TanStack Router conventions
- Auto-generated files like routeTree.gen.ts
- Type declaration files like vite-env.d.ts, global.d.ts, fonts.d.ts

For each file found, provide:
1. The full path
2. The current filename
3. What the kebab-case filename should be

Be very thorough - check every directory: src/server/, src/lib/, src/components/, src/hooks/, src/types/, src/mocks/, and any other directories.
</user_query>

Searching the codebase for `.ts` and `.tsx` files whose basenames aren't kebab-case (excluding the specified paths).

[REDACTED]

Here is a **read-only** pass over every `*.ts` / `*.tsx` under `apps/org-next/src` (51 files from search; `styles.css` is the only other `src` file). **Excluded:** anything under `src/routes/`, `routeTree.gen.ts`, `vite-env.d.ts`, `global.d.ts`, `fonts.d.ts`, and implicitly `node_modules` (none under `src`).

**Criterion:** basename is kebab-case if it is **all lowercase** and uses **hyphens between words**. **Single-token** names (e.g. `error.ts`, `router.tsx`, `field.tsx`) count as OK. Any **uppercase letter** in the basename usually means **not** kebab-case (e.g. camelCase / PascalCase).

---

---

### Directories checked (non-route `*.ts` / `*.tsx` only)

- **`src/components/`** — 6 non-kebab above; `field.tsx` is OK.
- **`src/components/ui/`** — `ratingStarIcon.tsx` above; `field.tsx` OK.
- **`src/hooks/`** — `useCreateCampaign.ts` above.
- **`src/lib/`** — 5 files above; `auth.ts`, `rollbar.ts` OK.
- **`src/mocks/`** — `rmpConstants.ts` above; `browser.ts` OK.
- **`src/server/`** — 6 files above; `campaigns.ts`, `campaigns.test.ts`, `dashboard.ts`, `tenants.ts`, `session.ts`, `error.ts`, `env.server.ts`, `campaigns.ts` OK.
- **`src/types/`** — `auth.ts`, `bootstrap.ts`, `campaign.ts` — all single-word / lowercase — OK.
- **`src/` (root)** — `router.tsx` OK.

---

### Explicitly **not** listed (per your rules)

- **All of `src/routes/`** (e.g. `_authed.tsx`, `$campaignId.tsx`, `auth-guard.ts`, etc.).
- **`/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/src/routeTree.gen.ts`**
- **`/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/src/vite-env.d.ts`**
- **`/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/src/global.d.ts`**
- **`/Users/duhl/git/ui/apps/org-next/src/fonts.d.ts`**

If you use a stricter rule (e.g. disallow multiple dots like `foo.test.ts` unless every segment is kebab), say so and the list can be refined; with your stated definition, **18** files are the full set.
